APOC.AI.risk_formula: AI_risk = w1*Delta_M + w2*C_compute + w3*D_delegate + w4*O_open + w5*S_safety

APOC.Biblical.risk_formula: Biblical_risk = w1*B_belief + w2*B_rhetoric + w3*B_conflict + w4*B_funding + w5*B_social

APOC.Bio.risk_formula: Bio_risk = w1*B_labs + w2*C_cost + w3*S_lag + w4*U_clusters + w5*V_cov

APOC.Biosphere.risk_formula: Biosphere_risk = w1*E_extinct + w2*P_pollin + w3*S_soil + w4*F_fish + w5*L_forest

APOC.Climate.risk_formula: Climate_risk = w1*T_anom + w2*O_heat + w3*I_arc + w4*CH4 + w5*A_amoc

APOC.Cyber.risk_formula: Cyber_risk = w1*V_vuln + w2*P_patch + w3*I_incidents + w4*R_routing + w5*F_fraud

APOC.Epistemic.risk_formula: Epistemic_risk = w1*M_misinfo + w2*D_deepfake + w3*T_trust + w4*N_conc + w5*C_reject

APOC.Infra.risk_formula: Infra_risk = w1*R_margin + w2*T_lead + w3*S_ship + w4*E_vol + w5*A_age

APOC.Market.risk_formula: Market_risk = w1*D_debt + w2*C_spread + w3*V_vol + w4*F_fx + w5*S_commodity

APOC.Nuclear.risk_formula: Nuclear_risk = w1*W + w2*L + w3*F_ew + w4*V_trty + w5*G_ten

APOC.State.risk_formula: State_risk = w1*T_trust + w2*P_protest + w3*E_defect + w4*R_auto + w5*G_gini
